## Team Context
**Your assigned name**: spec-developer-mlm-n6l
**Team Lead**: team-lead
**Communication Protocol**: SendMessage types: QUESTION / BLOCKER / DONE / SUGGESTION

## Task Reference
Beads ID: mlm-n6l
Phase: execution (Wave 1)

## Task: Create status page routes in App Router

### Problem
Status page components exist in `src/widgets/status/` (HelloPage, SuccessPage, ErrorPage, DeclinePage) but have no App Router pages wiring them.

The features (SubmitRequest, FillRequest) already use `router.push(getRouteSuccess())` and `router.push(getRouteError())` which will resolve to `/cards/success` and `/cards/error` respectively.

### Steps

1. Read existing status components to understand their imports:
- `/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/src/widgets/status/ui/SuccessPage.tsx`
- `/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/src/widgets/status/ui/ErrorPage.tsx`  
- `/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/src/widgets/status/ui/DeclinePage.tsx`
- `/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/src/widgets/status/ui/HelloPage.tsx`
- `/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/src/widgets/status/index.ts`

2. Create 4 new App Router page files:

**`/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/app/cards/success/page.tsx`**:
```tsx
import { SuccessPage } from '@/widgets/status';

export default function Success() {
  return <SuccessPage />;
}
```

**`/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/app/cards/error/page.tsx`**:
```tsx
import { ErrorPage } from '@/widgets/status';

export default function Error() {
  return <ErrorPage />;
}
```

**`/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/app/cards/decline/page.tsx`**:
```tsx
import { DeclinePage } from '@/widgets/status';

export default function Decline() {
  return <DeclinePage />;
}
```

**`/Users/zeizel/projects/mlm/app/cards/hello/page.tsx`**:
```tsx
import { HelloPage } from '@/widgets/status';

export default function Hello() {
  return <HelloPage />;
}
```

3. These are simple server component wrappers that render client-side status widgets. The status widgets already have `'use client'` directive.

## IMPORTANT
- Do NOT touch the existing files in `src/widgets/status/`
- Do NOT modify app/cards/[productType]/[productName]/page.tsx or any other existing route
- Only CREATE new files under app/cards/

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] /cards/success renders SuccessPage
- [ ] /cards/error renders ErrorPage
- [ ] /cards/decline renders DeclinePage
- [ ] /cards/hello renders HelloPage
- [ ] All 4 files created as server components importing from @/widgets/status
summary: Create status page routes in App Router
